name: Solidus Milestone M5 - Runtime Compatibility, Observability, and Release
description: Harden runtime support, improve operations visibility, and publish release process for stable delivery.

userStories.title: Harden Node, Bun, and Deno compatibility
userStories.description: As a library maintainer, I want runtime compatibility guarantees so users can adopt Solidus confidently.
acceptanceCriteria: Add runtime CI matrix for Node, Bun, and Deno
Isolate Node-specific code paths in adapters
Publish compatibility caveats and supported versions
Publish runtime compatibility table in docs
userStories.notes: Added runtime matrix scripts in package.json, runtime smoke suite in scripts/runtime/smoke.ts, and CI workflow in .github/workflows/runtime-matrix.yml. Isolated webhook payload runtime conversion into src/packages/stripe/runtime-payload.ts and updated verifier in src/packages/stripe/webhooks.ts with coverage in src/packages/stripe/__tests__/webhooks.test.ts. Published compatibility table and caveats in docs/runtime-compatibility.md and linked from README.md.

userStories.title: Implement observability and operations support
userStories.description: As an operator, I want structured telemetry and runbooks so billing incidents can be detected and resolved quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Add structured logging and metric hooks
Add health diagnostics and webhook lag metrics
Add runbooks for webhook secret rotation and outage handling
Pass smoke tests for emitted metrics and log fields
Include operations section in public docs
userStories.notes: Implemented optional structured observability hooks in src/packages/core/webhooks.ts for logs and metrics, including webhook lag metric (webhook.lag.ms) across processed/retrying/dead-letter transitions. Added health diagnostics helper getWebhookHealthDiagnostics with pending/retrying/dead-letter counts and lag warnings, plus smoke coverage in src/packages/core/__tests__/webhooks.test.ts. Expanded operations docs in docs/express-webhooks.md and docs/webhook-operations-runbook.md, including secret-rotation and outage handling guidance.

userStories.title: Finalize packaging and release process
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want a reliable release workflow so stable versions and migration guidance are easy to consume.
acceptanceCriteria: Finalize facade package APIs and versioning policy
Publish migration guide from ad hoc Stripe integrations
Pass end-to-end example app workflow in CI
Publish release notes and upgrade guide
userStories.notes: Implemented US-003 preparation without publishing a release: finalized facade entrypoint with createSolidusFacade in src/packages/facade/index.ts and coverage in src/packages/facade/__tests__/index.test.ts, added migration guide in docs/migration-from-ad-hoc-stripe.md, added manual release runbook/versioning policy in docs/release-manual.md and release-notes template in docs/release-notes-and-upgrade-guide.md, and added example app CI workflow in .github/workflows/example-app.yml with smoke script scripts/example-app/smoke.ts. Remaining manual step: publish first stable release candidate when explicitly approved.
